lineage.logic: COPY loads PARQUET data into temp staging table stage_temp using MANIFEST file at SRC_BUCKET; IAM_ROLE provided via ${IAM_ROLE}. Stage structure matches target via CREATE TEMP TABLE stage_temp (LIKE fct_orders).

Upsert pre-step: delete from target fct_orders any rows whose composite primary keys match stage_temp. Join predicates use PK columns: fct_orders.${PK_COLUMNS_1} = stage_temp.${PK_COLUMNS_1} AND fct_orders.${PK_COLUMNS_2} = stage_temp.${PK_COLUMNS_2}.
Insert new/updated rows into fct_orders by selecting all columns from stage_temp (INSERT INTO fct_orders SELECT * FROM stage_temp).
Audit logging: inserts a load log record for table_name='fct_orders', load_start_time='${LOAD_TIMESTAMP}', rows_inserted computed as (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stage_temp), status='SUCCESS'.
